Images Directory

Add your images to this directory. The theme expects the following images:

Required Images

  • home.jpg - Main image for the home page (displayed in the Research section)
  • primary-investigator.jpg - Photo of the primary investigator
  • lab-technician.jpg - Photo of the lab technician
  • graduate-student.jpg - Photo of the graduate student

Image Specifications

  • Format: JPG, PNG, or WebP
  • Recommended dimensions:
    • home.jpg: 800x600px or similar aspect ratio
    • Profile photos: 400x400px (square) or 400x500px (portrait)

Adding More Images

You can add additional images to this directory and reference them in your markdown files using:

![Alt text](/assets/img/your-image.jpg)
